mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO albums (album_id, album_name, album_cover_url) VALUES (#{albumId}, #{albumName}, #{coverUrl})
INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, taste_vector) VALUES (#{userId}, VEC_FromText(#{tasteVector})) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE taste_vector = VEC_FromText(#{tasteVector}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
